rows.text: The report scope covers Singtel, Digital InfraCo, our infrastructure arm that drives digital transformation with data centres, submarine cables, satellites and the Paragon platform, and our wholly-owned subsidiaries NCS and Optus.
rows.source_sentence: The report scope covers Singtel, Digital InfraCo, our infrastructure arm that drives digital transformation with data centres, submarine cables, satellites and the Paragon platform, and our wholly-owned subsidiaries NCS and Optus.

rows.text: We stepped up engagement with our suppliers, encouraging them to address their own emissions in support of shared climate goals.
rows.source_sentence: e stepped up engagement with our suppliers, encouraging them to address their own emissions in support of shared climate goals.

rows.text: We co-developed Singapore’s first Emissions Factors Registry in partnership with the Singapore Business Federation, the Agency for Science, Technology and Research, and PwC Singapore.
rows.source_sentence: Recognising the complexity of scope 3 emissions tracking, we co-developed Singapore’s first Emissions Factors Registry in partnership with the Singapore Business Federation, the Agency for Science, Technology and Research, and PwC Singapore.

rows.text: This initiative provides a centralised platform of industry-specific emissions data, helping businesses measure and report their carbon footprint with greater accuracy and consistency.
rows.source_sentence: This initiative provides a centralised platform of industry- specific emissions data, helping businesses measure and report their carbon footprint with greater accuracy and consistency.

rows.text: Digital inclusion has long been a Group priority.
rows.source_sentence: Digital inclusion has long been a Group priority.

rows.text: Internal carbon pricing (ICP) was piloted in 2021 for high-emission business cases using a shadow price of S$50 per tonne of CO2e.
rows.source_sentence: To further integrate climate considerations into business decisions, we piloted internal carbon pricing (ICP) in 2021 for high-emission business cases using a shadow price of S$50 per tonne of CO2e.

rows.text: In 2023, internal carbon pricing was formalised as the emissions-weighted average cost of carbon (e-WACC), guiding capital expenditure decisions and vendor selection.
rows.source_sentence: In 2023, we formalised this as the emissions-weighted average cost of carbon (e-WACC), a mechanism now used to guide capital expenditure decisions and vendor selection by embedding the long-term cost of emissions.

rows.text: The Board Diversity Policy ensures that the Board comprises a balanced mix of expertise, experience, attributes and perspectives to guide the Group’s long-term strategy and governance.
rows.source_sentence: Our Board Diversity Policy ensures that the Board comprises a balanced mix of expertise, experience, attributes and perspectives to guide the Group’s long-term strategy and governance.

rows.text: Singtel Group aims to reduce absolute scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions from 2023 baseline by 55% by 2030.
rows.source_sentence: Reduce absolute scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions from 2023 baseline by 55% by 2030.

rows.text: Singtel Group aims to reduce scope 3 carbon emissions from 2023 baseline by 40% by 2030.
rows.source_sentence: Reduce scope 3 carbon emissions from 2023 baseline by 40% by 2030.

rows.text: Singtel Group achieved a 14.0% decrease in scope 1 and 2 absolute emissions in FY2025 compared to the previous year.
rows.source_sentence: In FY2025, scope 1 and 2 absolute emissions are 355,768 tCO2e, representing a decrease of 14.0% from last year.

rows.text: Singtel Group achieved a 19.3% reduction in scope 1 and 2 absolute emissions compared to the 2023 SBTi baseline.
rows.source_sentence: This marks a 19.3% reduction, equivalent to 84,832 tCO2e, compared to our 2023 SBTi baseline of 440,600 tCO2e.

rows.text: Singtel Group achieved a 30.5% reduction in scope 1 and 2 absolute emissions since 2015, exceeding the 25.0% reduction target set for FY2025.
rows.source_sentence: Since 2015, our scope 1 and 2 absolute emissions have reduced by 30.5%, exceeding the 25.0% reduction target set for FY2025.

rows.text: Singtel Group achieved a 38.7% reduction in scope 3 emissions for categories included in its SBTi target compared to the 2023 SBTi baseline.
rows.source_sentence: Compared to the 2023 SBTi baseline of 3,622,512 tCO2e, our scope 3 emissions for the selected categories decreased by 38.7%.

rows.text: Singtel Group aims to uphold the highest standards of customer data privacy protection and cyber security measures in adherence to data protection laws.
rows.source_sentence: Uphold the highest standards of customer data privacy protection and cyber security measures in adherence to data protection laws – PDPA in Singapore and Privacy Act and Telecommunications Act in Australia – with zero major incidents.

rows.text: Singtel Group continues to educate its employees and improve practices and processes to reduce the recurrence of data breaches.
rows.source_sentence: We continue to educate our employees and improve practices and processes to reduce the recurrence of data breaches1.

rows.text: The company likely adheres to fair pricing and competitive practices through its commitment to ethical business practices and compliance with regulatory standards, ensuring transparency and integrity in its operations.
